title: DeepSeek-V4：智能体可实际使用的百万Token上下文
title_en: DeepSeek-V4: a million-token context that agents can actually use
summary: DeepSeek-V4 实现了百万Token级别的上下文窗口，使AI智能体能够处理超长文档和复杂任务。该模型在长文本理解与推理上进行了优化，显著提升了智能体在真实场景中的可用性。DeepSeek-V4 achieves a million-token context window, enabling AI agents to process extremely long documents and complex tasks. The model is optimized for long-context understanding and reasoning, significantly improving agent usability in real-world scenarios.
